speaker.name: Rabbi Shea Stern
speaker.title: Rabbi
speaker.desc: Rabbi Shea Stern is a Daf Hayomi Maggid Shiur at the Scheiner's Beis Medrash Ohr Chaim in Monsey. He learnt in Yeshivas Novominsk and is also a talmid of R' Dovid Soloveitchik. Rabbi Stern gives an Oraysa Shiur at Khal Bais Avrohom in the evening. For questions and comments email him at  jshmuelstern@gmail.com
